capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a configuration management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a configuration management service?

questions.prompt: Is the configuration management service reviewed at least quarterly to measure its efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the configuration management service reviewed at least quarterly to measure its efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented configuration management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented configuration management process?

questions.prompt: Does the configuration management process apply to the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the configuration management process apply to the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Is the configuration management process automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the configuration management process automated?

questions.prompt: Is the configuration management process reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the configuration management process reviewed at least quarterly?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented KPI/KRI for the configuration management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented KPI/KRI for the configuration management process?

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for configuration management reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the KPIs and KRIs for configuration management reviewed at least quarterly?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented configuration management policy for subject changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented configuration management policy for subject changes?

questions.prompt: Are all configuration management policies for subjects applicable across the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all configuration management policies for subjects applicable across the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Are all configuration management policies for subjects reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all configuration management policies for subjects reviewed at least quarterly?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented configuration management policy for endpoint changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented configuration management policy for endpoint changes?

questions.prompt: Are all configuration management policies for endpoints applicable across the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all configuration management policies for endpoints applicable across the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Are all configuration management policies for endpoints reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all configuration management policies for endpoints reviewed at least quarterly?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented configuration management policy for network changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a formalized and documented configuration management policy for network changes?

questions.prompt: Are all configuration management policies for network applicable across the entire enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate are all configuration management policies for network applicable across the entire enterprise?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a configuration management database that centrally manages all configuration items?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a configuration management database that centrally manages all configuration items?

questions.prompt: Are configurations added and removed automatically from the CMDB?
questions.intent: Evaluate are configurations added and removed automatically from the CMDB?

questions.prompt: Are CMDB configurations reviewed at least quarterly to validate the integrity of configuration?
questions.intent: Evaluate are CMDB configurations reviewed at least quarterly to validate the integrity of configuration?

questions.prompt: Is the CMDB integrated with other solutions like change management, policy management, or visibility solutions to provide contextual information?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the CMDB integrated with other solutions like change management, policy management, or visibility solutions to provide contextual information?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with change, policy, and visibility solutions

questions.prompt: Can the entire network be provisioned with configuration based on configuration storage?
questions.intent: Evaluate can the entire network be provisioned with configuration based on configuration storage?

questions.prompt: Is there a central storage for all network configuration?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a central storage for all network configuration?

questions.prompt: Does the centralized CMDB or SDN have the capability to automatically provision the network in response to admin requests or network downtimes?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the centralized CMDB or SDN have the capability to automatically provision the network in response to admin requests or network downtimes?

questions.prompt: Are the SDN network configurations reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the SDN network configurations reviewed at least quarterly?

questions.prompt: Can the SDN integrate with other security solutions to provide end-to-end resilience?
questions.intent: Evaluate can the SDN integrate with other security solutions to provide end-to-end resilience?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise store all network and application design and configuration documents?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise store all network and application design and configuration documents?
questions.evaluation_focus: Network and application design documents stored

questions.prompt: Are documents for the entire deployment stored securely?
questions.intent: Evaluate are documents for the entire deployment stored securely?

questions.prompt: Are designs and configuration reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate are designs and configuration reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a solution to manage all application configuration?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a solution to manage all application configuration?

questions.prompt: Does the solution manage all application configuration centrally?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the solution manage all application configuration centrally?

questions.prompt: Does the application configuration solution have the capability to automate configuration addition, modification, and deletion based on triggers like environment, threat, or context?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the application configuration solution have the capability to automate configuration addition, modification, and deletion based on triggers like environment, threat, or context?

questions.prompt: Are application configurations reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate are application configurations reviewed at least quarterly?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise store all application configuration data securely?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise store all application configuration data securely?

questions.prompt: Does secure storage extend to all enterprise applications or only critical ones?
questions.intent: Evaluate does secure storage extend to all enterprise applications or only critical ones?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a solution to manage all endpoint configuration?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a solution to manage all endpoint configuration?

questions.prompt: Does the solution manage all endpoint configuration centrally?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the solution manage all endpoint configuration centrally?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a separate team that handles identity and subject configuration, including identity lifecycles on Active Directory?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a separate team that handles identity and subject configuration, including identity lifecycles on Active Directory?

questions.prompt: Does the identity and subject configuration team manage all identity assets centrally?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the identity and subject configuration team manage all identity assets centrally?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a separate team that handles endpoint asset configuration?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a separate team that handles endpoint asset configuration?

questions.prompt: Does the endpoint configuration team manage all endpoint assets centrally?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the endpoint configuration team manage all endpoint assets centrally?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a separate team that handles application asset configuration?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a separate team that handles application asset configuration?

questions.prompt: Does the application configuration team manage all application assets centrally?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the application configuration team manage all application assets centrally?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a separate team that handles data asset configuration?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a separate team that handles data asset configuration?

questions.prompt: Does the data configuration team manage all data assets centrally?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the data configuration team manage all data assets centrally?

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging configuration changes to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a formal documented process for logging configuration changes to the SOC?

questions.prompt: Is logging of configuration changes and lifecycle made securely to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate is logging of configuration changes and lifecycle made securely to the SOC?

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to configuration captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate are dynamic changes to configuration captured and transferred to the SOC?

questions.prompt: Are infrastructure-as-code and policy-as-code pipeline changes logged to the SOC alongside runtime configuration changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether IaC pipeline changes are logged to the SOC
